query: UPDATE users SET role = 'admin' WHERE openId = (SELECT OWNER_OPEN_ID FROM (SELECT 'test' as OWNER_OPEN_ID) as temp) OR email LIKE '%kezie%' OR name LIKE '%Kezie%';
